session.user:
Run the following command and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened:
pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/ -x -v
Report the full output including any failures or errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for PR submit pipeline unit tests

session.tool_result:
